Off Calendar Dec-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. HUNTER PYLA OF THE SUNDEEN SALINAS & PYLE, TEL. NO. 1-510-663-9240 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DANIEL C. ZAMORA OF THE WEINTRAUB TOBIN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-772-9639 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND DARYL ROBINSON'S Motion To Compel Further Independent Mental Examination Of Plaintiff Remeke James is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. The Defendant has met the standard of "good cause" to permit its newly designated expert to engage in a mental examination of the Plaintiff. That examination is limited to the parameters set forth in the March 5, 2013 Declaration of James R. Missett, MD PhD, paragraph 7. No testing will be permitted. Moreover, as the Plaintiff has stipulated to limit his claims for liability and emotional distress in time to March 2013, the exam will be limited in its scope to that time period. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt
